questions.q: Allah kaun hai?
questions.a: Allah ek hai, woh hamara Khaaliq hai. Woh sab kuch jaanta aur dekh sakta hai.

questions.q: Kalima Tayyaba kya hai?
questions.a: "La ilaha illallah Muhammadur Rasoolullah" — yeh pehla Kalima hai. Iska matlab hai Allah ke siwa koi ibadat ke laiq nahi.

questions.q: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) kaun the?
questions.a: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) Allah ke aakhri Nabi hain. Woh Makkah mein paida hue aur hume Islam sikhaya.

questions.q: Hum roz kitni baar namaz padhte hain?
questions.a: Din mein 5 waqt namaz farz hai. Fajr, Zuhr, Asr, Maghrib aur Isha — yeh 5 waqt hain.

questions.q: Bismillah ka matlab kya hai?
questions.a: Bismillah ka matlab hai "Allah ke naam se shuru karta hoon." Har kaam shuru karne se pehle Bismillah padhna chahiye.

questions.q: Alhamdulillah ka matlab kya hai?
questions.a: Alhamdulillah ka matlab hai "Sab taarif Allah ke liye hai." Koi nemat milne par Alhamdulillah kehna chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein salaam kaise karte hain?
questions.a: "Assalamu Alaikum" keh kar salaam karte hain. Iska jawab "Wa Alaikum Assalam" dena chahiye.

questions.q: Quran kya hai?
questions.a: Quran Allah ka paak kalaam hai jo Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) par nazil hua. Yeh hamari zindagi ka rahnuma hai.

questions.q: Wuzu kyun kiya jaata hai?
questions.a: Namaz se pehle wuzu karna zaroori hai. Wuzu se jism aur roh dono paak hote hain.

questions.q: Roza kyun rakha jaata hai?
questions.a: Roza Ramadan mein Allah ki khushi ke liye rakha jaata hai. Isse sabr aur taqwa milta hai.

questions.q: Sach bolna kyun zaroori hai?
questions.a: Islam mein sach bolna bahut zaroori hai. Nabi (SAW) ne farmaya "Sach bolo chahe kadwa lage."

questions.q: Maa baap ki izzat kyun karni chahiye?
questions.a: Allah ne Quran mein maa baap ki izzat ka hukm diya. Unki khidmat se Allah khush hota hai.

questions.q: Zakat kya hai?
questions.a: Zakat apne maal ka 2.5% ghareebon ko dena hai. Yeh Islam ka chautha rukn hai.

questions.q: Hajj kya hai?
questions.a: Hajj Makkah jakar Allah ki ibadat karna hai. Yeh Islam ka paanchwaan rukn hai.

questions.q: Jannat kya hai?
questions.a: Jannat woh jagah hai jahan nekon ko aakhirat mein reward milega. Wahan hamesha khushi aur sukoon hoga.

questions.q: Jahannam kya hai?
questions.a: Jahannam woh jagah hai jahan gunahgaron ko saza milegi. Allah se darte hue gunah se bachna chahiye.

questions.q: Farishte kaun hain?
questions.a: Farishte Allah ke paak bande hain jo noor se bane hain. Woh Allah ke hukm se kaam karte hain.

questions.q: Hazrat Jibrail (AS) kaun hain?
questions.a: Hazrat Jibrail (AS) Allah ke khaas farishte hain. Woh Anbiya par Wahi laate the.

questions.q: Namaz mein kya padhte hain?
questions.a: Namaz mein Surah Fatiha aur doosri Surahs padhte hain. Allah ki hamd aur tasbih bhi karte hain.

questions.q: Safai ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Islam mein safai nisf Iman hai. Ghar, kapde aur jism sab saaf rakhna chahiye.

questions.q: Pyaar aur mohabbat Islam mein kaisi hai?
questions.a: Islam mein sabse zyada mohabbat Allah aur Nabi (SAW) se honi chahiye. Phir walidain aur baqi insanon se.

questions.q: Burai se kyun bachna chahiye?
questions.a: Burai se bachna Allah ka hukm hai. Naik kaam karne se Allah khush hota hai.

questions.q: Khana khaane se pehle kya padhna chahiye?
questions.a: Khana khaane se pehle Bismillah padhni chahiye. Aur khaane ke baad Alhamdulillah kehna chahiye.

questions.q: Raat ko sone se pehle kya dua padhte hain?
questions.a: Sone se pehle "Bismika Allahumma amootu wa ahya" padhte hain. Yeh sunnat hai jo Nabi (SAW) ne sikhaayi.

questions.q: Musalmaan hone ki kya nishani hai?
questions.a: Musalmaan Kalima padhta hai, namaz padha hai, roza rakhta hai. Woh sach bolta hai aur doosron ki madad karta hai.

questions.q: Quran mein kitni Surahs hain?
questions.a: Quran mein 114 Surahs hain. Pehli Surah Al-Fatiha aur aakhri Surah An-Naas hai.

questions.q: Islam ke kitne arkan hain?
questions.a: Islam ke 5 arkan hain — Kalima, Namaz, Roza, Zakat, Hajj. Yeh sab farz hain.

questions.q: Allah ko kya pasand hai?
questions.a: Allah ko naik kaam, sach bolna aur ibadat pasand hai. Woh mehnat karne walon ko bhi pasand karta hai.

questions.q: Dua kya hai?
questions.a: Dua Allah se mangna hai — yeh ibadat ka sabse ahem hissa hai. Allah farmata hai "Mujhse maango mein qubool karoonga."

questions.q: Nek kaam karne ka kya faaida hai?
questions.a: Nek kaam karne se Allah khush hota hai aur sawab milta hai. Aakhirat mein yeh kaam kaam aayenge.

questions.q: Islam ke 5 arkan kya kya hain?
questions.a: Kalima, Namaz, Roza, Zakat aur Hajj — yeh Islam ke 5 arkan hain. Yeh sab farz ibaadaat hain.

questions.q: Wuzu ke kitne farz hain?
questions.a: Wuzu ke 4 farz hain — munh dhona, haath dhona, sar ka masah, pair dhona. Yeh sab zaroori hain.

questions.q: Namaz ke kitne farz hain?
questions.a: Namaz ke 7 shartein aur 6 arkan hain. Bina in ke namaz nahi hoti.

questions.q: Roza kis mahine mein farz hai?
questions.a: Ramadan ul Mubarak ka poora mahina roza rakhna farz hai. Yeh Islam ka teesra rukn hai.

questions.q: Zakat kis par farz hai?
questions.a: Zakat us Muslim par farz hai jis ke paas nisab ke barabar maal ho. Maal par ek saal guzarna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.q: Hajj kab farz hua?
questions.a: Hajj 9 Hijri mein farz hua. Zindagi mein ek baar har mustati Muslim par farz hai.

questions.q: Quran Majeed kab nazil hua?
questions.a: Quran Ramadan ke mahine mein nazil hona shuru hua. Pehli Wahi Ghaar-e-Hira mein 610 AD mein nazil hui.

questions.q: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) ki paidaish kab hui?
questions.a: Nabi (SAW) 12 Rabi-ul-Awwal 570 AD ko paida hue. Is saal ko "Aam-ul-Feel" kaha jaata hai.

questions.q: Amanat kya hai?
questions.a: Amanat ka matlab kisi ki cheez ki hifazat karna hai. Nabi (SAW) ko "Al-Ameen" — amaanatdar kaha jaata tha.

questions.q: Sach bolne ka kya faida hai?
questions.a: Sach bolne se Allah khush hota hai aur log aitbaar karte hain. Nabi (SAW) ne farmaya sach jannat ki taraf le jaata hai.

questions.q: Jhooth bolne ka kya nuqsan hai?
questions.a: Jhooth bolne se Allah naraaz hota hai aur log aitbaar nahi karte. Jhooth jahannam ki taraf le jaata hai.

questions.q: Walidain ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Walidain ki izzat karo, unki baat mano aur khidmat karo. Unke liye dua karo — "Rabbi irhamhuma."

questions.q: Ustaad ka kya haq hai?
questions.a: Ustaad ki izzat karo, unki baat dhyan se suno. Unke liye dua karo — woh ilm dete hain.

questions.q: Islam mein safai ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: "Safai nisf Iman hai" — yeh Hadith hai. Jism, kapde aur ghar sab saaf rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Khana khaane ka sunnat tareeqa kya hai?
questions.a: Bismillah parhna, dahine haath se khana aur apne saamne se khana sunnat hai. Khaane mein se aib nahi nikaalna chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein mehman nawazi kya hai?
questions.a: Mehman Allah ki rehmat le kar aata hai — Islam mein mehman ki khidmat zaroori hai. Jo Allah aur aakhirat par iman rakhe woh mehman ki izzat kare.

questions.q: Namazon ke naam kya kya hain?
questions.a: Fajr, Zuhr, Asr, Maghrib aur Isha — yeh 5 waqt ki namazein hain. Har namaz ka waqt muqarrar hai.

questions.q: Azaan kya hai?
questions.a: Azaan namaz ke liye bulaane ka tareeqa hai. Hazrat Bilal (RA) pehle muazzin the.

questions.q: Imam kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Imam woh hota hai jo namaz mein aage khadhaa ho kar namaz padhata hai. Imam ko Quran acha aana chahiye.

questions.q: Jummah ki namaz kab hoti hai?
questions.a: Jummah ki namaz Jummah (Friday) ko Zuhr ke waqt hoti hai. Yeh mard Muslims par farz hai.

questions.q: Eid ul Fitr kab hoti hai?
questions.a: Eid ul Fitr Ramadan ke baad 1 Shawwal ko hoti hai. Is din roza nahi rakhna chahiye.

questions.q: Eid ul Adha kab hoti hai?
questions.a: Eid ul Adha 10 Zil Hajj ko hoti hai. Is din qurbani ki sunnat hai.

questions.q: Qurbani kya hai?
questions.a: Qurbani Allah ki raza ke liye janwar zabah karna hai. Yeh Hazrat Ibrahim (AS) ki sunnat hai.

questions.q: Ramadan mein kya khaas ibaadaat hoti hain?
questions.a: Ramadan mein roza, taraweeh, tilawat-e-Quran aur sadqa kiya jaata hai. Lailat-ul-Qadr is mein hoti hai.

questions.q: Lailat-ul-Qadr kya hai?
questions.a: Lailat-ul-Qadr Ramadan ki aakhri 10 raaton mein hai. Yeh hazar mahino se behtar raat hai.

questions.q: Sadqa kya hai?
questions.a: Sadqa Allah ki raah mein maal kharch karna hai. Yeh farz nahi lekin bahut sawab ka kaam hai.

questions.q: Nabi (SAW) ki koi sunnat batao.
questions.a: Dahine haath se khana, miswak karna, Bismillah padhna — yeh Nabi (SAW) ki sunnaten hain. In par amal karna sawab hai.

questions.q: Dua maangne ka sahi tareeqa kya hai?
questions.a: Dua mein pehle Allah ki hamd karo phir Nabi (SAW) par darood bhejo. Phir apni hajat maango.

questions.q: Waqt ki pabandi Islam mein kaise hai?
questions.a: Islam mein namaz ka waqt muqarrar hai — waqt ki pabandi sikhata hai. Farmaya: "Waqt sabse badi nemat hai."

questions.q: Islam mein mehnat karne ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Islam mein halal mehnat karna ibadat hai. Nabi (SAW) ne farmaya "Mehnat karne wala Allah ka dost hai."

questions.q: Gareeb ki madad kyun karni chahiye?
questions.a: Gareeb ki madad karna sadqa aur sawab ka kaam hai. Allah ne farmaya — gareeb ko khilana badi nemat hai.

questions.q: Hasad (jealousy) ka kya nuqsan hai?
questions.a: Hasad naiki ko aise khaata hai jaise aag lakdi khaati hai. Islam mein hasad karna mana hai.

questions.q: Shukr guzari kya hai?
questions.a: Allah ki neamton par shukar ada karna zaroori hai. Farmaya: "Agar shukar karoge to mein aur zyada dunga."

questions.q: Islam mein bhai chara kya hai?
questions.a: Sab Muslims ek doosre ke bhai hain. Ek Momin doosre Momin ka dard mehsoos karta hai.

questions.q: Islam mein nemat ka kya tasawwur hai?
questions.a: Har nemat Allah ki taraf se hai — sihhat, maal, ilm sab. Inpar shukar karna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Bure kaam se kyun bachna chahiye?
questions.a: Bure kaam se Allah naraaz hota hai aur sawab khatam hota hai. Buri sangat se bachna chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein ilm ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: "Taleem haasil karo chahe China tak jaana pade." Ilm haasil karna har Muslim mard aur aurat par farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein namaaz ka kya faida hai?
questions.a: Namaz burai aur fahsha se rokti hai. Dil ko sukoon milta hai aur Allah se qurbat hoti hai.

questions.q: Achhe akhlaaq ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Nabi (SAW) farmaya "Mein achhe akhlaaq ko mukammal karne aaya hoon." Achha akhlaaq insaan ko duniya aur aakhirat mein kamyaab karta hai.

questions.q: Islam mein touba ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: Allah Tawwab hai — maaf karne wala. Sachchi touba karne se gunah maaf ho jaate hain.

questions.q: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) ki wiladat kab aur kahan hui?
questions.a: Nabi (SAW) 12 Rabi-ul-Awwal 570 AD ko Makkah mein paida hue. Unke walid Abdullah pehle wafat pa chuke the.

questions.q: Nabi (SAW) ki parwarish kaise hui?
questions.a: Pehle Hazrat Halima Sadia ne doodh pilaya, phir walida Amina ne parwarish ki. Walida ki wafat ke baad dada aur phir chacha Abu Talib ne parwarish ki.

questions.q: Islam ke arkan-e-khamsa kya hain?
questions.a: Kalima, Namaz, Roza, Zakat aur Hajj — yeh 5 arkan hain. Yeh sab farz ibaadaat hain.

questions.q: Quran Majeed mein kitni Surahs aur Aayaat hain?
questions.a: Quran mein 114 Surahs aur 6236 Aayaat hain. Pehli Surah Al-Fatiha aur aakhri An-Naas hai.

questions.q: Anbiya ikram ki zaroorat kyun hai?
questions.a: Anbiya Allah ke bheeje hue hain jo insanon ko seedha raasta dikhate hain. Woh Allah ka paigham laate hain.

questions.q: Hazrat Ibrahim (AS) ki azmat bayan karo.
questions.a: Hazrat Ibrahim (AS) "Khalilullah" — Allah ke dost — kahlate hain. Unhon ne bete ki qurbani ka imtihaan pass kiya.

questions.q: Hazrat Musa (AS) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Musa (AS) "Kalimullah" kahlate hain — Allah se seedha baat karne wale. Unhon ne Bani Israel ko Firoun se azaad karaya.

questions.q: Hazrat Isa (AS) ka maqam kya hai?
questions.a: Hazrat Isa (AS) "Roohullah" kahlate hain. Woh Allah ke Nabi hain — Allah ke bete nahi.

questions.q: Aasmani kitaaben kya hain?
questions.a: Torat, Zaboor, Injeel aur Quran — yeh 4 bari aasmani kitaaben hain. Quran aakhri aur mahfooz kitaab hai.

questions.q: Roza rakhne ke kya faayde hain?
questions.a: Roza sabr, taqwa aur Allah se qurbat deta hai. Ghareeb ki bhook ka ehsaas hota hai.

questions.q: Zakat dene ke kya fawaaid hain?
questions.a: Zakat se maal paak hota hai aur ghurbat kam hoti hai. Dene wale ka dil sakhi hota hai.

questions.q: Hajj ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Hajj mein poori duniya ke Muslims ek jagah jama hote hain — Islam ki wahdat ka mazhar. Hajj ke baad gunah maaf ho jaate hain.

questions.q: Pehli Wahi kab nazil hui?
questions.a: Pehli Wahi 610 AD mein Ghaar-e-Hira mein nazil hui. Surah Alaq ki pehli 5 aayaat nazil huin.

questions.q: Nabi (SAW) ko kya mushkilaat uthani padin?
questions.a: Makkah mein 13 saal zulm sahte rahe — Taif mein pathhar khaye. Muhasara hua — bhookha rehna pada.

questions.q: Hijrat-e-Madina kyun zaroori thi?
questions.a: Makkah mein zulm inteha par tha — Islam par amal mushkil ho gaya tha. Madina mein Islamic state ki buniyaad rakhi ja sakti thi.

questions.q: Haqooq-ul-Walidain kya hain?
questions.a: Walidain ki izzat karo, unki khidmat karo, baat mano. Unhe "Uff" tak mat kaho.

questions.q: Haqooq-ul-Jaar (pados ke haqooq) kya hain?
questions.a: Paros ko takleef mat do, unhe khana khilao. Mushkil mein unki madad karo.

questions.q: Islam mein yateem ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Yateem ka maal mat khao — Quran ka hukm. Unhe pyaar do, taleem dilao aur shelter do.

questions.q: Islam mein khwatoon ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Islam ne khatoon ko meerath, taleem aur nikah mein marzi ka haq diya. Jannat maa ke qadam ke neeche hai.

questions.q: Islam mein science ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Quran mein "Iqra" — parho — ka pehla hukm ilm haasil karne ka tha. Islam ne science ko ibadat ka darja diya.

questions.q: Ghazwa kya hota hai?
questions.a: Ghazwa woh jang hai jisme Nabi (SAW) khud shamil hote. Sariyya woh jang hai jisme Nabi (SAW) nahi hote.

questions.q: Islam mein jang ke kya usool hain?
questions.a: Civilians, auraton aur bacchon par hamla nahi. Zakhmion ki madad karo aur qaidiyoon se achha sulook karo.

questions.q: Islam mein sood ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Islam mein sood (interest) bilkul haram hai. Quran mein Allah ne sood ko haram kiya.

questions.q: Islam mein tijarat ke kya usool hain?
questions.a: Sach bolna, dhoka nahi dena aur sahi tola naap rakhna zaroori hai. Sachcha taajir Anbiya ke saath hoga.

questions.q: Islam mein janwaron ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Janwaron ko takleef mat do — unhe bhookha mat rakho. Ek aurat dozakh mein gayi kyunke billi ko bandh kar mara.

questions.q: Islam mein environment ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Darakh lagana sadqa hai." Paani barbaad mat karo. Zameen ko naqsaan mat pahunchao.

questions.q: Islam mein ilm haasil karne ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: "Taleem haasil karo chahe China jaana pade." Ilm haasil karna har Muslim par farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein khidmat-e-khalq kya hai?
questions.a: "Logon mein se behtar woh hai jo logon ke kaam aaye." Gareeb ki madad karna sawab hai.

questions.q: Islam mein waqt ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Quran mein "Wal-Asr" — waqt ki qasam khai. Waqt barbaad karna Islam mein pasandida nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein touba ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: Allah Tawwab hai — maaf karne wala. Sachchi touba karne se gunah maaf ho jaate hain. "Allah ki rehmat se naaumeed mat ho."

questions.q: Islam mein sabr ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Allah sabr karne walon ke saath hai." Mushkilaat mein sabr karna Allah ka hukm hai.

questions.q: Islam mein shukar ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Agar shukar karoge to mein aur zyada dunga." Neamton par Allah ka shukar ada karna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein tawakkul kya hai?
questions.a: Tawakkul ka matlab Allah par bharosa karna hai. "Oont bandho phir Allah par tawakkul karo."

questions.q: Islam mein ikhlaas kya hai?
questions.a: Ikhlaas ka matlab sirf Allah ki raza ke liye kaam karna hai. Ria (dikhaawa) se bachna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein amal ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Iman sirf dil mein nahi — amal bhi zaroori hai." Achha amal insaan ko jannat le jaata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein qurbani ki kya sunnah hai?
questions.a: Hazrat Ibrahim (AS) ne bete ki qurbani di — Allah ne qubool kiya. Eid ul Adha mein qurbani sunnat-e-Ibrahim hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ramadan ki kya fazilat hai?
questions.a: Ramadan mein jannat ke darwaze khulte hain, jahannam ke band hote hain. Lailat-ul-Qadr is mein hoti hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Lailat-ul-Qadr ki kya fazilat hai?
questions.a: Lailat-ul-Qadr hazar mahino se behtar raat hai. Is raat ibadat karna bahut sawab ka kaam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein I'tikaf kya hai?
questions.a: I'tikaf Ramadan ke aakhri 10 din masjid mein reh kar ibadat karna hai. Yeh Nabi (SAW) ki sunnat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Eid ki kya khushiyan hain?
questions.a: Eid Allah ki nemat ka shukar ada karne ka din hai. Sab se milo, gale lago, gareeb ko khilao.

questions.q: Islam mein namaaz-e-janaza kya hai?
questions.a: Namaaz-e-janaza marne wale ke liye dua hai — yeh farz-e-kifaya hai. Janaze mein shamil hona sunnat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein marne ke baad kya hota hai?
questions.a: Marne ke baad barzakh ki zindagi shuru hoti hai. Phir qiyamat, hisaab aur jannat ya jahannam.

questions.q: Islam mein qiyamat ki kya nishaniyan hain?
questions.a: Jhooth ka aam hona, amaanat khatam hona, deen se door hona — yeh qiyamat ki nishaniyan hain.

questions.q: Islam mein iman ke kitne arkan hain?
questions.a: Iman ke 6 arkan hain — Allah, Farishte, Kitaben, Anbiya, Aakhirat, Taqdeer par iman. Yeh sab zaroori hain.

questions.q: Taqdeer par iman kya hai?
questions.a: Taqdeer par iman ka matlab hai — jo hota hai Allah ki marzi se hota hai. Mehnat karo — baaki Allah par chhodho.

questions.q: Islam mein munaafiq kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Munaafiq woh hai jo zahir mein Muslim ho lekin andar se nahi. "Munaafiq ki 3 nishaniyan — jhooth bolna, waada todna, amanat mein khiyanat."

questions.q: Hazrat Adam (AS) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Adam (AS) pehle insaan aur pehle Nabi hain. Allah ne unhe apna khalifa banaya aur sab cheezein sikhain.

questions.q: Hazrat Nuh (AS) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Nuh (AS) ne 950 saal tabligh ki. Toofaan mein kashti bana kar Mominon ko bachaya.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Fatiha ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Fatiha "Ummul Quran" hai — Quran ki maa. Namaz ki har rakaat mein padhna farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Tayammum kya hai?
questions.a: Tayammum paani na milne par mitti se taharat ka tareeqa hai. Safar ya beemar hone par jaiz hai.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Badr ki ahmiyat kya thi?
questions.a: Ghazwa-e-Badr 2 Hijri mein hua — Islam ki pehli badi fatah. 313 Muslims ne 1000 mushrikeen ko haraaya.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Uhud mein shikast kyun hui?
questions.a: Teer andazon ne Nabi (SAW) ka hukm na maan kar pahaar chhoda. Khalid bin Waleed ne peeche se hamla kiya.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Khandaq mein khandaq khodne ka mashwara kisne diya?
questions.a: Hazrat Salman Farsi (RA) ne khandaq khodne ka mashwara diya. Yeh Iranian military strategy thi.

questions.q: Sulah Hudaibiya ki kya ahmiyat thi?
questions.a: Sulah Hudaibiya 6 Hijri mein hua — 10 saal ka aman muahida. Is ke baad 2 saal mein zyada log Muslim hue.

questions.q: Fatah Makkah kab hua?
questions.a: Fatah Makkah 8 Hijri (630 AD) mein hua. 10,000 ka lashkar — bina khoon kharaabe ke fath hua.

questions.q: Fatah Makkah mein Nabi (SAW) ne kya kiya?
questions.a: Nabi (SAW) ne aam maafi ka elaan kiya — "Aaj koi reproach nahi." Ka'ba ko 360 buton se paak kiya.

questions.q: Hajjatul Wida kab hua?
questions.a: Hajjatul Wida 10 Hijri (632 AD) mein hua. Nabi (SAW) ka yeh aakhri hajj tha.

questions.q: Hajjatul Wida mein Nabi (SAW) ne kya farmaya?
questions.a: "Kisi Arab ko Ajam par barteri nahi — siwaay taqwa ke." "Mein tum mein Quran aur Sunnat chhodhta hoon."

questions.q: Jihad ki haqeeqi tarif kya hai?
questions.a: Jihad ka matlab sirf jung nahi — apne nafs se ladna sabse bada jihad hai. Bolkar haq ki baat karna bhi jihad hai.

questions.q: Islam mein aurat ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: Islam ne aurat ko meerath, taleem aur nikah mein marzi ka haq diya. "Jannat maa ke qadam ke neeche hai."

questions.q: Khulafa-e-Rashideen kaun the?
questions.a: Hazrat Abu Bakr, Umar, Usman aur Ali (RA) — yeh Chaar Khulafa-e-Rashideen hain. Inhon ne Nabi (SAW) ki seerat par chala.

questions.q: Hazrat Abu Bakr (RA) ka daur kya tha?
questions.a: Hazrat Abu Bakr (RA) ne 2 saal hukoomat ki. Unhon ne murtadeen se ladaai ki aur Islam ko bachaya.

questions.q: Hazrat Umar (RA) ka daur kya tha?
questions.a: Hazrat Umar (RA) ne 10 saal hukoomat ki — adal ki misaal. Unke daur mein Iran, Sham, Misr fatah hue.

questions.q: Hazrat Usman (RA) ka daur kya tha?
questions.a: Hazrat Usman (RA) ne 12 saal hukoomat ki. Unhon ne Quran ka final compilation karwaya.

questions.q: Hazrat Ali (RA) ka daur kya tha?
questions.a: Hazrat Ali (RA) ne 5 saal hukoomat ki — ilm aur adl ka daur. Unhon ne bahut mushkilaat ka samna kiya.

questions.q: Haqooq-ul-Ibad kya hain?
questions.a: Haqooq-ul-Ibad woh haqooq hain jo ek insaan ka doosre par hain. Islam mein yeh Allah ke haqooq ke barabar zaroori hain.

questions.q: Islam mein gareeb ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Gareeb ko khana khilao, zakat do. Unka mazaq mat udao — woh bhi Allah ke bande hain.

questions.q: Islam mein musafir ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Musafir ki madad karo, shelter do. Farmaya: "Musafir ka maal na khaao."

questions.q: Islam mein beemaar ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Beemaar ki iyaadat (takleef poochna) sunnat hai. Dua karo aur madad karo.

questions.q: Islam mein padosi ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Paros ko takleef mat do, khana khilao. "Woh momin nahi jis ka pados bhookha soye."

questions.q: Quran Majeed ki hifazat kaise hoti hai?
questions.a: Allah ne farmaya "Hum ne Quran nazil kiya aur hum iske hifazat karne wale hain." Hafiz bhi hifazat ka zariya hain.

questions.q: Hadith kya hai?
questions.a: Hadith Nabi (SAW) ke aqwaal, afaal aur taqqariraat ka majmua hai. Yeh Quran ke baad doosra bada maakhaz hai.

questions.q: Sunnah kya hai?
questions.a: Sunnah Nabi (SAW) ka tareeqa hai — jo unhon ne kiya ya karne diya. Sunnah par amal karna sawab hai.

questions.q: Islam mein social life kaisi honi chahiye?
questions.a: Sab ke saath izzat se milna, mazloom ki madad karna. Islam mein barabri aur bhai chara zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein shadi ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Shadi Nabi (SAW) ki sunnat hai — "Nikah meri sunnat hai." Shadi se deen mukammal hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein talaq ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Talaq halal cheezoon mein Allah ko sabse zyada na-pasand hai. Shadi bachaane ki koshish pehle zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein bachon ki tarbiyat kaise karein?
questions.a: Bachon ko Quran, namaz aur akhlaaq sikhao. Unhe pyaar aur izzat se tarbiyat do.

questions.q: Islam mein khidmat-e-walidain kya hai?
questions.a: "Tumhara Rabb hukm deta hai ke Uske siwa kisi ki ibadat mat karo aur walidain ke saath bhalaai karo." Unhe budhape mein akela mat choro.

questions.q: Islam mein adalat ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: "Adal karo chahe apne khilaf ho." Nabi (SAW) ne farmaya agar Fatima bhi chori karti to haath kattta.

questions.q: Islam mein tijarat ke kya usool hain? (Class 7-8)
questions.a: Sach bolna, dhoka nahi dena, sahi tola. Sood haram — halal tijarat karo.

questions.q: Islam mein mazloom ki madad kyun zaroori hai?
questions.a: "Mazloom ki badduwa se daro — woh seedha Allah tak jaati hai." Mazloom ki madad karna farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein amn ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Islam ka naam hi amn hai — "As-Salam." Aman aur sulah Islam ka bunyadi usool hai.

questions.q: Islam mein waada poora karna kyun zaroori hai?
questions.a: "Waada poora karo — waada poochha jaayega." Waada torna munafiqat ki nishani hai.

questions.q: Islam mein gheebet (backbiting) ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Gheebat haram hai — "Kya tum apne murde bhai ka gosht khaana pasand karte ho?" Kisi ki peethe peechhe burai mat karo.

questions.q: Islam mein hasad aur bughz ka kya nuqsan hai?
questions.a: "Hasad naiki ko aise khaata hai jaise aag lakdi khaati hai." Hasad aur bughz dil ko beemar karta hai.

questions.q: Nabi (SAW) ki seerat aaj bhi kyun relevant hai?
questions.a: Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi mukammal namoona hai — ghar, tijarat, jang, siyasat sab mein. Quran ne farmaya "Tumhare liye Rasool mein behterein example hai."

questions.q: Islam mein insaani barabari kya hai?
questions.a: "Kisi Arab ko Ajam par barteri nahi siwaay taqwa ke." Islam ne rang, nasal aur zaat ki barteri khatam ki.

questions.q: Islam mein freedom of religion kya hai?
questions.a: "Deen mein koi jabr nahi" — Surah Al-Baqarah. Islam mein mazhab par jabr nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein non-Muslims ke kya haqooq hain?
questions.a: Non-Muslims ko mazhabi azaadi hai, jaan maal ki hifazat hai. Unpar zulm karna haram hai.

questions.q: Islam mein dost ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Insaan apne dost ke deen par hota hai — dekho kise dost banate ho." Nek dost ki sangat zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein ghar ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Tumhara ghar tumhare liye jannat hai." Ghar mein sukoon aur mohabbat honi chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein taleem ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Ilm haasil karna har Muslim mard aur aurat par farz hai." Taleem insaan ko kamyaab banati hai.

questions.q: Islam mein mehnat ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Koi khana apne haath ki mehnat se behtar nahi." Halal mehnat karna ibadat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein dua ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Dua ibadat ka zar hai — "Mujhse maango mein qubool karoonga." Har waqt dua maangna chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein taqdeer par iman ka kya matlab hai?
questions.a: Taqdeer par iman ka matlab — jo hota hai Allah ki marzi se hota hai. Mehnat karo aur Allah par bharosa rakho.

questions.q: Hazrat Khadija (RA) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Khadija (RA) pehli Muslim khatoon aur Nabi (SAW) ki pehli biwi thin. Unhon ne apna maal Islam par laga diya.

questions.q: Islam mein Taraweeh kya hai?
questions.a: Taraweeh Ramadan mein Isha ke baad 20 rakaat sunnat namaz hai. Is mein Quran sunna aur padhna sawab hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Sadqa-e-Fitr kya hai?
questions.a: Sadqa-e-Fitr Eid ul Fitr se pehle gareeb ko diya jaata hai. Yeh Eid ki namaz se pehle ada karna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Dawah kya hai?
questions.a: Dawah Allah ki taraf bulana hai — hikmat aur moiza hasana se. Yeh har Muslim ki zimmedari hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Masjid ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Masjid ibadat ka markaz hai — namaz, ilm, ijtemaat. "Allah ke nazdeek pasandida jagah masjid hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Jummah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Jummah Muslims ka haftewar ijtima hai — khutba, namaz, dua. Mard Muslims par farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Waqf kya hai?
questions.a: Waqf maal ko Allah ki raah mein hamesha ke liye waqf karna hai. Masjid, school, hospital — yeh sab waqf ke zariye hain.

questions.q: Islam mein I'tikaf ki kya fazilat hai?
questions.a: I'tikaf Ramadan ke aakhri 10 din masjid mein rehna aur ibadat karna hai. Nabi (SAW) hamesha I'tikaf karte the.

questions.q: Islam mein Isra wal Miraj kya hai?
questions.a: Isra — Makkah se Baitul Muqaddas ka safar. Miraj — Aasmanon ki sair aur Allah se mulaqat. 27 Rajab ko yeh waqea hua.

questions.q: Islam mein jannat ki kya neamatein hain?
questions.a: Jannat mein woh sab kuch hoga jo dil chahe. Sab se badi nemat Allah ka didar hoga.

questions.q: Islam mein Shahaadat kya hai?
questions.a: Shahaadat Allah ki raah mein jaan dena hai. Shaheed ko seedha jannat milti hai — hisaab nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Tawheed kya hai?
questions.a: Tawheed ka matlab Allah ki wahdaniyat — ek hona — par iman hai. Shirk sabse bada gunah hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Shirk kya hai?
questions.a: Shirk Allah ke saath kisi ko shareek karna hai — yeh sabse bada gunah hai. "Allah shirk maaf nahi karta."

questions.q: Islam mein Risalat kya hai?
questions.a: Risalat ka matlab Anbiya par iman hai. Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) aakhri Nabi hain — koi Nabi baad mein nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Aakhirat kya hai?
questions.a: Aakhirat marne ke baad ki zindagi hai — hisaab, jannat ya jahannam. Aakhirat par iman zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Taqwa kya hai?
questions.a: Taqwa Allah ka dar dil mein rakhna aur gunah se bachna hai. "Insaan mein sabse behtara woh hai jo zyada taqwa wala ho."

questions.q: Islam mein Bid'at kya hai?
questions.a: Bid'at deen mein nayi cheez daakhil karna hai jo Nabi (SAW) se sabit nahi. "Har Bid'at gumrahi hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Halal aur Haram mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Halal woh kaam hai jo Islam mein jaiz hai — pakiza rizq. Haram woh kaam hai jo bilkul mana hai — karne par azab.

questions.q: Islam mein fitna kya hai?
questions.a: Fitna fasaad aur anarchy hai — Islam mein yeh haram hai. "Fitna qatl se bada gunah hai."

questions.q: Islam mein kafir kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Kafir woh hai jo Allah aur Nabi (SAW) ko nahi maanta. Islam mein un ke saath bhi insaani sulook karna zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein hisaab-e-kitaab kya hai?
questions.a: Qiyamat ke din har kaam ka hisaab hoga. Naiki weighs heavy — burai weighs light.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Ikhlas ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Ikhlas Quran ka teen-tihaai hissa hai — tawheed ka khulasa. Sirf 4 aayaat mein Allah ki mukammal pehchaan.

questions.q: Hazrat Bilal (RA) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Bilal (RA) Islam ke pehle muazzin the — Nabi (SAW) ke khaas sahabi. Inho ne azaab saha lekin Islam nahi chhhoda.

questions.q: Islam mein ghulam ke kya haqooq the?
questions.a: Ghulam ke saath wahi khilao jo khud khao. Unhe azaad karna sabse bada sawab tha.

questions.q: Islam mein Jihad-bin-Nafs kya hai?
questions.a: Jihad-bin-Nafs apne nafs ko control karna hai — sabse bada jihad. Nabi (SAW) ne farmaya "Hum asghar jihad se akbar jihad ki taraf laute."

questions.q: Meesaq-e-Madina kya tha?
questions.a: Meesaq-e-Madina 1 Hijri mein hua — duniya ka pehla written constitution. Sab ko mazhabi azaadi aur jaan maal ki hifazat di gayi.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Badr ka nateeja kya tha?
questions.a: 313 Muslims ne 1000 mushrikeen ko haraaya — Islam ki pehli badi fatah. 70 mushrik mare, 70 qaid hue.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Uhud ka sabaq kya hai?
questions.a: Hukm na maanne ka nuqsan — 70 sahaba shaheed hue. Sabaq: Nabi (SAW) ka hukm hamesha maano.

questions.q: Ghazwa-e-Khandaq ki strategy kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Salman Farsi (RA) ki mashwarat par khandaq khodi. 10,000 ka lashkar khandaq par se guzar nahi saka.

questions.q: Sulah Hudaibiya ke kya fayde hue?
questions.a: 10 saal ke aman mein zyada log Muslim hue — "Fatah-e-Mubeen" kaha gaya. Islam ki dawat aur pheli.

questions.q: Fatah Makkah ki kya ahmiyat thi?
questions.a: 21 saal baad Makkah fatah hua — bina khoon ke. Nabi (SAW) ne aam maafi di — dushman dil jeet liye.

questions.q: Hajjatul Wida ka khutba kya tha?
questions.a: "Kisi Arab ko Ajam par barteri nahi siwaay taqwa ke." "Quran aur Sunnat thamey rehna — gumraah nahi hoge."

questions.q: Islam mein khilafat kya hai?
questions.a: Khilafat Nabi (SAW) ki niyabat mein Islami hukoomat hai. Khalifa Quran aur Sunnat ke mutabiq hukoomat karta hai.

questions.q: Hazrat Abu Bakr (RA) ki sabse badi khidmat kya thi?
questions.a: Murtadeen se ladaai kar ke Islam bachaya. Quran ki pehli tahreeri compilation karwayi.

questions.q: Hazrat Umar (RA) ki sabse badi khidmat kya thi?
questions.a: Adal ki misaal — ameer aur gareeb ek. Islam ko Iran, Sham, Misr tak phailaya.

questions.q: Hazrat Usman (RA) ki sabse badi khidmat kya thi?
questions.a: Quran ka final mushaf tayar karwaya — aaj wahi Quran hai. Apna maal Islam par kharch kiya.

questions.q: Hazrat Ali (RA) ki sabse badi khidmat kya thi?
questions.a: Ilm aur adl ka daur — "Mein ilm ka shehr hoon aur Ali uska darwaza." Mushkilaat mein sabr kiya.

questions.q: Islamic Civilization ki bunyadi khususiyaat kya hain?
questions.a: Tawheed par buniyaad, ilm ki targheeب، انصاف aur masawaat. Yeh civilization science, literature aur architecture mein aage thi.

questions.q: Al-Khwarizmi ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Al-Khwarizmi Algebra ke bani hain — "Algorithm" unhi ke naam par. Unhon ne zero ka concept Europe ko diya.

questions.q: Ibn Sina ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Ibn Sina ki "Al-Qanoon fit-Tibb" 600 saal tak European medical textbook rahi. Woh infectious diseases ka concept laaye.

questions.q: Ibn al-Haytham ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Ibn al-Haytham Optics ke bani hain — camera obscura ijaad kiya. Scientific method unhon ne establish kiya.

questions.q: Islam aur science mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Islam ne "Iqra" — parho — se ilm ki targheeب دی۔ Quran mein 750 se zyada scientific aayaat hain.

questions.q: Islam mein insaani haqooq ka kya tasawwur hai?
questions.a: Islam ne 1400 saal pehle woh haqooq diye jo aaj UN Charter mein hain. Rang, nasal, zaat ki barteri khatam ki.

questions.q: Islam mein economic system kya hai?
questions.a: Zakat se ghurbat khatam hoti hai, sood haram hai. Halal tijarat aur insaafi taqseem Islam ka economic usool hai.

questions.q: Islam mein political system kya hai?
questions.a: Shura — mashwara compulsory. Sovereignty sirf Allah ki. Adal aur khidmat leader ki zimmedari.

questions.q: Islam mein social system kya hai?
questions.a: Family system mazboot, auraton ko haqooq, ghurebon ki madad. Haqooq-ul-Ibad ka poora nizam.

questions.q: Islam mein judicial system kya hai?
questions.a: Quran aur Sunnat ke mutabiq faisle. Ameer aur gareeb ke liye ek qanoon. Qazi mustaqil hoga.

questions.q: Islam mein education system kya hai?
questions.a: "Ilm haasil karo China tak." Masjid-e-Nabwi mein "Suffah" — pehla school. Ilm mard aur aurat dono par farz.

questions.q: Islam mein family system kya hai?
questions.a: Shadi sunnat, bachon ki tarbiyat zaroori. Maa baap ki khidmat farz. Family Islam ka bunyadi idara hai.

questions.q: Islam mein khwatoon ki taleem ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Ilm haasil karna har Muslim mard aur aurat par farz hai." Hazrat Ayesha (RA) Islam ki pehli female scholar thin.

questions.q: Islam mein Sunnah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Sunnah Quran ki practical explanation hai. "Jo Rasool de woh lo aur jo mana kare ruk jao."

questions.q: Islam mein Ijtihad kya hai?
questions.a: Ijtihad naye masail ka Quran aur Sunnah ki roshni mein hal nikalna hai. Yeh Islam ki flexibility hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Fatwa kya hai?
questions.a: Fatwa kisi masle ka Islami hukm hai jo aalim deta hai. Fatwa Quran aur Sunnah ki roshni mein hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Fiqh kya hai?
questions.a: Fiqh Islami law hai — Hanafi, Maliki, Shafai, Hanbali — 4 madhab hain. Yeh sab Quran aur Sunnah se nikle hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Tafseer kya hai?
questions.a: Tafseer Quran ki tafseel aur wazahat hai. Mashhoor mufassireen — Ibn Katheer, Tabari, Zamakhshari.

questions.q: Islam mein Hadith ki kitni qismein hain?
questions.a: Sahih, Hasan, Daif — yeh 3 basic qismein hain. Sahih Hadith woh hai jo muttasil isnad ke saath ho.

questions.q: Islam mein Seerat kya hai?
questions.a: Seerat Nabi (SAW) ki zindagi ka bayan hai. Yeh Islam ko samajhne ka bada zariya hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Hajj aur Umra mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Hajj farz hai — saal mein ek baar, Zil Hajj mein. Umra sunnat-e-muakkadah hai — saal mein kabhi bhi.

questions.q: Islam mein Islamic calendar kya hai?
questions.a: Islamic calendar Hijri calendar hai — Hijrat-e-Madina se shuru. Yeh qamar calendar hai — 12 mahine.

questions.q: Islam mein Muharram ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Muharram Islamic calendar ka pehla mahina hai. 10 Muharram ko Ashura — Roza sunnat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Rabi-ul-Awwal ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Rabi-ul-Awwal mein Nabi (SAW) paida hue — 12 Rabi-ul-Awwal. Is mahine mein Seerat ki mehfilen hoti hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Shaban ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Shaban Ramadan ki tayyaari ka mahina hai. 15 Shaban — Shab-e-Baraat — maghfirat ki raat.

questions.q: Islam mein Lailat-ul-Qadr kab hai?
questions.a: Lailat-ul-Qadr Ramadan ki aakhri 10 raaton mein hai. 27 wein raat zyada mutawattir hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Bait-ul-Maal kya tha?
questions.a: Bait-ul-Maal Islamic state ka khazana tha. Zakat, kharaaj, jizyah yahan jama hota — gareeb, yateem, musafir ko milta.

questions.q: Islam mein Jizyah kya tha?
questions.a: Jizyah non-Muslim zimmiyon se liya jaata tha — un ke hifazat aur khidmaat ke badle. Auraton, bacchon, budhon par nahi tha.

questions.q: Islam mein Ushr kya tha?
questions.a: Ushr zeraai paidawar ka 10% ya 5% tha jo Muslims dete the. Yeh bhi bait-ul-maal mein jata tha.

questions.q: Islam mein Tabligh kya hai?
questions.a: Tabligh Islam ka paigham pohnchana hai. "Mujh se ek aayat hi sahi pohonchao."

questions.q: Islam mein Imam-ul-Masjid ka kya kaam hai?
questions.a: Imam namaz padhata hai, khutba deta hai, mazhabi masail hul karta hai. Woh community ka rahnuma hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Khutba kya hai?
questions.a: Khutba Jummah aur Eid mein diya jaata hai — Quran aur Sunnat ki roshni mein naseehat. Yeh farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Mufti kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Mufti woh aalim hai jo Islami masail ka hukm bata sakta hai — Fatwa de sakta hai. Unhe Quran aur Fiqh ka ilm hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Qazi kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Qazi Islami judge hota hai jo Quran aur Sunnah ke mutabiq faisla karta hai. Uske faisle mein koi tafreeq nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Khalifa kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Khalifa Nabi (SAW) ki niyabat mein Islami hukoomat karta hai. Woh Quran aur Sunnat ka paabund hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Shura kya hai?
questions.a: Shura mashwara ka nizam hai — "Apne kaam mein unse mashwara karo." Islamic democracy ka bunyadi usool.

questions.q: Islam mein Bay'at kya hai?
questions.a: Bay'at Khalifa ya rahnuma se wafadari ka waada karna hai. Sahaaba ne Nabi (SAW) se bay'at ki.

questions.q: Islam mein Jihad-bil-Lisan kya hai?
questions.a: Jihad-bil-Lisan baat kar ke haq ki baat kehna hai. "Zalim haakim ke saamne haq baat kehna afzal jihad hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Jihad-bis-Saif kya hai?
questions.a: Jihad-bis-Saif hathiyar se ladna hai — sirf difaa mein aur aakhri option. Civilians par hamla haram hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ghazi kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Ghazi woh hota hai jo Allah ki raah mein ladhta hai aur zinda wapas aata hai. Ghazi bhi bahut sawab wala hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nafl ibadat kya hai?
questions.a: Nafl ibadat farz se zyada hai — nafl namaz, roza, sadqa. Yeh Allah se qurbat ka zariya hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Tasawwuf kya hai?
questions.a: Tasawwuf dil ki safai aur Allah se qurbat ka ilm hai. Yeh Quran aur Sunnah ki roshni mein hona chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein Sunnat-e-Muakkadah kya hai?
questions.a: Sunnat-e-Muakkadah woh sunnat hai jo Nabi (SAW) ne hamesha padhne ki thi. Ise chhodna makrooh hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Makrooh kya hai?
questions.a: Makrooh woh kaam hai jo na-pasandida hai lekin haram nahi. Chhodna behtar hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Mubah kya hai?
questions.a: Mubah woh kaam hai jis mein koi sawab ya gunah nahi. Ijaazat hai lekin zaroori nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Mustahab kya hai?
questions.a: Mustahab woh kaam hai jo pasandida hai lekin farz nahi. Karne par sawab, na karne par gunah nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Awliya Allah kaun hain?
questions.a: Awliya Allah woh hain jo Allah se qareeb hain — taqwa, ilm aur ibadat ki wajah se. Unka maqam bahut aala hai.

questions.q: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) ki azmat kya thi?
questions.a: Hazrat Muhammad (SAW) "Khatim-un-Nabiyeen" hain — aakhri Nabi. Allah ne farmaya "Aap par darood bhejta hoon."

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ki hifazat kaise hoti hai?
questions.a: Allah ne Quran ki hifazat ka waada kiya — "Hum iske haafiz hain." Hafiz aur tahreeri — dono zareeye hain.

questions.q: Islam mein ilm-ul-Quran kya hai?
questions.a: Ilm-ul-Quran Quran samajhne ki ilm hai — Tajweed, Tafseer, Tarteel. Quran seekhna aur sikhana sawab hai.

questions.q: Islam mein namaaz ki kya ahamiyat hai?
questions.a: Namaz deen ka sutoon hai — "Namaz qiyam karo." Namaz Allah se seedha talluq hai.

questions.q: Islam mein roza ki kya ahamiyat hai?
questions.a: "Roza mera hai aur mein hi iska badla dunga." Roza nafs ki tarbiyat aur taqwa ka zariya hai.

questions.q: Islam mein zakat ki kya ahamiyat hai?
questions.a: Zakat se maal paak hota hai aur ghurbat kam hoti hai. "Unke maal mein saail aur mahroom ka hissa hai."

questions.q: Islam mein hajj ki kya ahamiyat hai?
questions.a: Hajj mein poori duniya ke Muslims jama hote hain. Gunah maaf hote hain — naye sire se zindagi shuru.

questions.q: Islam mein Eid ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Eid ibadat ke baad Allah ki khushi ka din hai. Sab se milo, gareeb ko khilao, khushiyan banto.

questions.q: Islam mein Zil Hajj ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Zil Hajj mein Hajj hota hai — 9 se 13 Zil Hajj. 10 Zil Hajj Eid ul Adha — qurbani ka din.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ke kya ahkaam hain?
questions.a: Namaz, zakat, roza, hajj — ibaadaat ke ahkaam. Haqooq-ul-Ibad — maamlaat ke ahkaam. Yeh sab Quran mein hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Deen aur Duniya mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Islam Deen aur Duniya dono ko shaamil karta hai. Nek kaam karte hue duniya ki taraqqi bhi Islam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Rajab ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Rajab haram mahina hai — is mein ladaai mana thi. 27 Rajab ko Isra wal Miraj hua.

questions.q: Islam mein Kharaaj kya tha?
questions.a: Kharaaj zameen par tax tha jo non-Muslim zimmi dete the. Yeh Islamic state ka ahem zariya-e-aamdan tha.

questions.q: Islam mein Ghaneema kya tha?
questions.a: Ghaneema jang mein mile maal ko kehte hain. Iska ek hissa Bait-ul-Maal mein jata tha.

questions.q: Islam mein corruption ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Corruption — rishatwat — Islam mein haram hai. "Rashawd lene aur dene wale par lanaat." Yeh social zulm hai.

questions.q: Islam mein terrorism ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: "Jo ek insaan ko maare goya usne poori insaniyat ko maara." Terrorism Islam mein haram hai.

questions.q: Islam mein suicide ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Khudkushi haram hai — "Apne aap ko mat maro — Allah tumhara raham karne wala hai." Mushkilaat mein sabr karo.

questions.q: Islam mein drug addiction ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Sharaab aur nesha aawaar cheezein haram hain — "Yeh Shaitaan ka kaam hai." Nesha aawaar cheezein society tabah karti hain.

questions.q: Islam mein racism ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: "Kisi Arab ko Ajam par barteri nahi siwaay taqwa ke." Islam mein rang, nasal ki barteri haram hai.

questions.q: Islam mein casteism ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Islam ne zaat paat khatam kiya — "Sab Adam ki aulad ho." Hazrat Bilal (RA) — ghulam — pehle muazzin bane.

questions.q: Islam mein patriotism kya hai?
questions.a: Apne mulk se pyaar Islam mein jaiz aur sawab ka kaam hai. Pakistan ki hifazat karna farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein banking system kya hona chahiye?
questions.a: Islamic banking — sood se paak. Mudarabah, Musharakah — profit sharing. Yeh halal tijarat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein poverty eradication kaise hogi?
questions.a: Zakat system properly nafi ho — Pakistan mein ghurbat khatam. Sadqa, waqf, qarz-e-hasana bhi zaroori hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Seerat-un-Nabi se economic lessons kya hain?
questions.a: Sood haram, halal tijarat, honest dealing — yeh Nabi (SAW) ki economic teachings. Aaj bhi applicable hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Seerat-un-Nabi se political lessons kya hain?
questions.a: Shura, adal, khidmat, transparency — Nabi (SAW) ka political system. Meesaq-e-Madina pehla constitution.

questions.q: Islam mein Seerat-un-Nabi se social lessons kya hain?
questions.a: Bhaichara, haqooq-ul-ibad, insaani musawaat — Nabi (SAW) ki social teachings. Fatah Makkah — aam maafi.

questions.q: Islam mein Seerat-un-Nabi se educational lessons kya hain?
questions.a: "Ilm haasil karo." Ghazwa-e-Badr ke qaidiyoon ko parha kar azaad kiya. Masjid-e-Nabwi mein "Suffah" school.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran-e-Hakeem ki scientific miracles kya hain?
questions.a: Embryology — Surah Al-Mominoon. Oceans — Surah Al-Furqan. Big Bang — Surah Al-Anbiya. Yeh sab science confirm karta hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ki literary miracles kya hain?
questions.a: Quran ka literary challenge — "Is jaisi ek Surah bana ke lao." 1400 saal mein koi nahi bana saka. Yeh Quran ki azmat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ki predictions kya hain?
questions.a: "Romans ghaalib honge" — 3 se 9 saal mein pura hua. "Quran mehfooz rahega" — aaj bhi wahi Quran. Yeh predictions sabit huin.

questions.q: Islam mein Hadith-e-Nabwi ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Hadith Quran ki explanation hai. "Mein tum mein do cheezein chhodh jaata hoon — Quran aur Sunnat." Dono zaroori hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Sahih Sittah kya hai?
questions.a: Sahih Sittah Hadith ki 6 mashhoor kitaabein hain — Bukhari, Muslim, Abu Daud, Tirmidhi, Nasai, Ibn Majah. Yeh sab mustanad hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Ijma kya hai?
questions.a: Ijma ulema ka kisi masle par ittefaq hai — yeh Quran aur Sunnah ke baad tees ahm zariya hai. Sahaaba ka Ijma sabse mustanad hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Qiyas kya hai?
questions.a: Qiyas kisi naye masle ka eski jaisi purani baat se hal karna hai. Yeh Islamic fiqh ka 4th zariya hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Maslahat kya hai?
questions.a: Maslahat umam ka bhala sochna hai — Islam mein public interest zaroori hai. Yeh bhi fiqh ki buniyad hai.

questions.q: Islam mein ghulami ka kya hukm tha?
questions.a: Islam ne ghulami khatam karne ki targheeب دی۔ Ghulam azaad karna sabse bada sadqa qarar diya gaya.

questions.q: Islam mein media ethics kya hain?
questions.a: Sach kaho, gheebat mat karo, fitna mat phailao. Media ko Islam ki dawat ka zariya banana chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein internet aur social media ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Nek kaam ke liye halal — dawat, taleem. Bure kaam ke liye haram — gheebat, jhooth, fahash. Niyyat zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein investment ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Halal business mein investment jaiz hai. Sood par investment haram. Stock market mein halal stocks mein invest kar sakte hain.

questions.q: Islam mein insurance ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Conventional insurance mein sood aur jahalat — problematic. Takaful — Islamic cooperative insurance — halal hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ke mutabiq adalat kya hai?
questions.a: "Adal karo chahe apne khilaf ho." Islam mein ameer aur gareeb ke liye ek qanoon hai.

questions.q: Islamic Civilization ki science mein kya khidmaat hain?
questions.a: Al-Khwarizmi — Algebra, Ibn Sina — Medicine, Ibn al-Haytham — Optics, Al-Biruni — Geography. Yeh sab Muslim scientists ne duniya badli.

questions.q: Islamic Civilization ki literature mein kya khidmaat hain?
questions.a: Rumi ki Masnavi, Ibn Khaldun ka Muqaddima, Al-Mutanabbi ki shayari. Yeh sab duniya ka beshtreen adab hai.

questions.q: Islamic Civilization ki architecture mein kya khidmaat hain?
questions.a: Alhambra, Dome of the Rock, Badshahi Mosque, Taj Mahal — yeh sab Islamic architecture ke shaahkaar hain. Yeh aaj bhi qaaim hain.

questions.q: Allama Iqbal ka Islam ke baare mein kya tasawwur tha?
questions.a: Iqbal ne "Khudi" — self-respect — ka tasawwur diya. Unhon ne Muslim ummah ko Quran ki taraf wapas aane ki dawat di.

questions.q: Iqbal ki mashoor nazmein kaun si hain?
questions.a: "Shikwa," "Jawab-e-Shikwa," "Tarana-e-Milli," "Khizr-e-Raah." Yeh sab Muslim ummat ko jaganae ki koshish hain.

questions.q: Pakistan ka Islamic background kya hai?
questions.a: Pakistan "La ilaha illallah" ki buniyad par bana. Quaid-e-Azam ne kaha — Pakistan Islami principles par chalega.

questions.q: Islam aur jadeed science mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Quran mein 750 se zyada scientific aayaat hain. Embryology, astronomy, oceanography — sab Quran confirm karta hai.

questions.q: Islam aur human rights mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Islam ne 1400 saal pehle human rights diye. Hajjatul Wida ka khutba — pehla Human Rights Charter.

questions.q: Islam aur democracy mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Islam mein Shura — mashwara — lekin sovereignty Allah ki. Democracy mein sovereignty awaam ki. Islam "theo-democracy" hai.

questions.q: Islam aur capitalism mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Capitalism mein sood halal — Islam mein haram. Islam mein zakat — mandatory redistribution. Islam aur capitalism mein bunyadi farq hai.

questions.q: Islam aur socialism mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Socialism mein zati maalikiyat nahi — Islam mein hai. Islam mein zakat se redistribution — jabri nahi. Islam middle way hai.

questions.q: Islam mein women empowerment kya hai?
questions.a: Islam ne auraton ko 1400 saal pehle meerath, taleem, nikah mein marzi ka haq diya. Aaj bhi yeh rights relevant hain.

questions.q: Islam mein child rights kya hain?
questions.a: Bacche ka haq — maa ka doodh, taleem, pyaar, hifazat. Islam ne bachon ko buniyaadi haqooq diye.

questions.q: Islam mein environmental ethics kya hain?
questions.a: "Darakh lagana sadqa hai." Paani barbaad mat karo. Zameen ki hifazat karo. Islam green philosophy hai.

questions.q: Islam mein secularism ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Islam deen aur duniya dono ko shaamil karta hai — secularism ka tasawwur Islam se alag hai. Deen aur siyasat alag nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein nationalism ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Watan se mohabbat jaiz hai — lekin nationalism jo doosron par zulm kare haram hai. Muslim ummah ek hai.

questions.q: Islam mein globalization ka kya hukm hai?
questions.a: Halal tijarat mein globalization jaiz. Haram culture ka phailana — problem. Islam universal message hai.

questions.q: Iqbal ke tasawwur-e-Pakistan ka khulasa kya hai?
questions.a: Iqbal ne 1930 mein separate Muslim state ka tasawwur pesh kiya. Muslims ka apna nizam-e-hayat ho jahan Quran o Sunnah ke mutabiq zindagi guzari ja sake.

questions.q: Islam mein Islamic State ki zaroorat kyun hai?
questions.a: Islamic State mein Quran aur Sunnah ke mutabiq nizam nafiz hota hai. Sovereignty sirf Allah ki — adal aur khidmat leader ki zimmedari.

questions.q: Islam mein Sharia kya hai?
questions.a: Sharia Quran aur Sunnah par mabni Islami qanoon hai. Yeh sirf punishments nahi — poori zindagi ka nizam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Maqasid-ul-Shariah kya hain?
questions.a: Maqasid-ul-Shariah ke 5 maqsad — Jaan, Aql, Nasl, Maal, Deen ki hifazat. Islam ka poora nizam inhi par hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Islaah-e-Muashara kaise ho sakta hai?
questions.a: Quran aur Sunnah ki roshni mein taleem, adal, zakat, aur akhlaaq se society theek hoti hai. Har fard apni jagah se islaah shuru kare.

questions.q: Islam mein Anbiya ki azmat kya hai? (Class 11-12 level)
questions.a: Anbiya Allah ke muntakhab bande hain — Masoom (gunahon se paak). Woh insaniyat ke liye role model hain aur Allah ka paigham laate hain.

questions.q: Jabir ibn Hayyan ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Jabir ibn Hayyan Chemistry ke bani hain — acids, alkalis aur distillation unki ijaad. Unhe "Father of Chemistry" kaha jaata hai.

questions.q: Al-Biruni ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Al-Biruni ne zameen ka diameter calculate kiya. Woh geography, astronomy aur indology mein pioneer the.

questions.q: Ibn Khaldun ka kya yogdan tha?
questions.a: Ibn Khaldun "Muqaddima" ke writer hain — sociology aur historiography ke bani. Woh civilization ke cycles samjhate the.

questions.q: Islam mein Tasawwuf ki haqeeqi tarif kya hai?
questions.a: Tasawwuf dil ki safai, nafs ka tazkia aur Allah se qurbat hai. Yeh Quran aur Sunnah ki roshni mein hona chahiye — bid'at nahi.

questions.q: Islam mein Kalam (Islamic philosophy) kya hai?
questions.a: Ilm-ul-Kalam aqaaid (beliefs) ki rational discussion hai. Ash'ariyya, Maturidiyya — mashhoor Kalam school hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Ikhwanul Muslimeen kya hai?
questions.a: Ikhwanul Muslimeen Hasan al-Banna ne 1928 mein banaya — Islamic revival movement. Islam ko muaashara mein wapas laane ki koshish.

questions.q: Islam mein Quran ki linguistic miracles kya hain?
questions.a: Quran ka style aur alfaz 1400 saal baad bhi unmatched hain. Arabic grammar ki highest form — koi match nahi kar saka.

questions.q: Islam mein Zahid kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Zahid woh hota hai jo duniya ki mohabbat dil se nikaalta hai — Allah ki mohabbat dikhata hai. Yeh zindagi mein simple rehna hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Wara kya hai?
questions.a: Wara ka matlab shubhat (doubt) wali cheezein chhodna hai. "Halal wazih hai, haram wazih hai — shubhat wali cheezein mat lo."

questions.q: Islam mein Zuhd kya hai?
questions.a: Zuhd duniya ki laag ki kami hai — dil mein sirf Allah ki mohabbat. Yeh ikhlaas ki ek khas qism hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nafs-e-Ammara kya hai?
questions.a: Nafs-e-Ammara woh nafs hai jo burai ka hukm deta hai. Ise control karna sabse bada jihad hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nafs-e-Lawwama kya hai?
questions.a: Nafs-e-Lawwama woh nafs hai jo gunah karne par pachtaata hai. Quran mein Allah ne is ki qasam khai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nafs-e-Mutmainna kya hai?
questions.a: Nafs-e-Mutmainna woh nafs hai jo sukoon mein hai — jannat walo ka nafs. "Aey sukoon wali jaan apne Rabb ki taraf aa."

questions.q: Islam mein Akhlaaq-e-Faazila kya hain?
questions.a: Akhlaaq-e-Faazila Islamiyat ki khas qualities hain — sach, amanat, sabr, shukar, ikhlaas, tawakkul. Yeh jannat ki raah hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Riya kya hai?
questions.a: Riya dikhaawa karna — ibadat Allah ke liye nahi, logon ko dikhane ke liye. Yeh chupa hua shirk hai — sabse khatarnak.

questions.q: Islam mein Kibr kya hai?
questions.a: Kibr takkabur — ghamand hai. "Woh jannat mein nahi jaayega jis ke dil mein zarra bhar kibr ho." Yeh buri quality hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Tawadu kya hai?
questions.a: Tawadu anwant — cheeze dil mein hona hai. "Allah tawadu wale ko uthata hai." Nabi (SAW) sabse zyada tawadu wale the.

questions.q: Islam mein Hilm kya hai?
questions.a: Hilm burdbaari — gusse ko rokna hai. "Jawaan mard woh nahi jo kudne mein taakotwar ho balke woh jo gusse mein khud ko rokne wala ho."

questions.q: Islam mein Rahm kya hai?
questions.a: Rahm raham dili hai — doosron ke dard ko mehsoos karna. "Rahm karne walon par Allah raham karta hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Jood wa Sakhawa kya hai?
questions.a: Jood wa Sakhawa sakhi hona hai — dil khol kar dena. Nabi (SAW) sabse zyada sakhi the — tez hawa se zyada.

questions.q: Islam mein Amr bil Maroof kya hai?
questions.a: Amr bil Maroof nek kaam ka hukm karna hai. Yeh har Muslim ki zimmedari hai — muashara ko nek banana.

questions.q: Islam mein Nahy anil Munkar kya hai?
questions.a: Nahy anil Munkar burai se rokna hai. "Tum mein se jo burai dekhe woh haath se roke, agar nahi to zaban se, agar nahi to dil se."

questions.q: Islam mein Ummah kya hai?
questions.a: Ummah poori Muslim millat — ek body ki tarah. "Momin ek doosre ke liye aayena hai." Ummah ki ittehad zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Khilafat ke zawal ke asbaab kya hain?
questions.a: Ilm se doorh hona, siyasi manfiqat, ittehad ka khatma, dushmanon ki sazishein — yeh zawal ke asbaab hain. Islam se door hone ka nateeja.

questions.q: Islam mein tajdeed kya hai?
questions.a: Tajdeed deen ki taazghi hai — her saal ek Mujaddid (reformer) aata hai jo Islam ko refresh karta hai. Yeh Allah ki hikmah hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Uswah-e-Hasanah kya hai?
questions.a: Uswah-e-Hasanah behterein example hai — Nabi (SAW) ka. "Tumhare liye Rasool mein behterein example hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Khidmat-e-Deen kya hai?
questions.a: Khidmat-e-Deen Islam ki khidmat karna hai — taleem, dawat, masjid, madrasah. Yeh sawab-e-jariya ka kaam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Sadqa-e-Jariya kya hai?
questions.a: Sadqa-e-Jariya woh sadqa hai jiska sawab marne ke baad bhi jari rahe — ilm, aulad, waqf. Yeh aakhirat ki tyaari hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nasab aur Huqooq ka kya system hai?
questions.a: Islam mein nasab — lineage — ki hifazat maqasid-ul-shariah mein se hai. Meerath aur haqooq nasab se mutalliq hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Aql ka kya maqam hai?
questions.a: Islam mein Aql — reason — ek bada tohfa hai. Allah ne Aql ko Amaanat diya — ise sahi kaam mein lagao. Aql ki hifazat maqasid mein hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Tarbiyat-e-Aulad ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Baap ka aulad par sabse bada haq — achhi tarbiyat." Quran, Sunnah, akhlaaq sikhana walidain ki zimmedari hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nikah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Nikah meri sunnat hai — jo meri sunnat se munhh morhta hai woh mujhse nahi." Nikah se nasl ki hifazat aur deen mukammal hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Meerath ka kya nizam hai?
questions.a: Islam ne meerath ka waazih nizam diya — Quran mein muqarrar hissa. Auratein bhi meerath leti hain — pehli sochni wali baat.

questions.q: Islam mein Wasiyyat kya hai?
questions.a: Wasiyyat marne se pehle apna maal taqseem karne ka hukm hai. Kisi ko Quran ke khilaf wasiyyat nahi kar sakte.

questions.q: Islam mein Qisas kya hai?
questions.a: Qisas — badla — ka hukm Quran mein hai. Lekin maafi dena aur diyat lena behtar hai. "Agar maaf karo to yeh taqwa ke qareeb hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Diyat kya hai?
questions.a: Diyat — blood money — qisas ki jagah dene ki raqqam hai. Yeh qatl ya zakhm ke badle mein diya jaata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Hudood kya hain?
questions.a: Hudood woh hadein hain jo Allah ne muqarrar ki hain — chori, zina par saza. Yeh deterrent hain jab properly adal ke saath nafiz ho.

questions.q: Islam mein Tazir kya hai?
questions.a: Tazir woh saza hai jo Quran mein muqarrar nahi — haakim tayin karta hai. Adal ke saath deni chahiye.

questions.q: Islam mein Aqd kya hai?
questions.a: Aqd muqarrar sharait ke saath contract hai — nikah, tijarat. Islam mein contracts ki pabandi farz hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Mudarabah kya hai?
questions.a: Mudarabah partnership hai jisme ek capital deta hai doosra kaam karta hai — profit share hota hai. Yeh Islamic banking ka bunyad hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Musharakah kya hai?
questions.a: Musharakah joint venture hai jisme sab partners capital aur kaam dono dete hain. Profit aur loss share hoti hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Murabahah kya hai?
questions.a: Murabahah cost plus profit sale hai — Islamic banking mein sood ki jagah yeh use hota hai. Transparency zaroori hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ijara kya hai?
questions.a: Ijara Islamic leasing hai — kisi cheez ka kiraya dena halal hai agar terms clear hon. Yeh Islamic finance mein use hota hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Sukuk kya hai?
questions.a: Sukuk Islamic bonds hain — asset-backed. Yeh sood ke baghair halal investment ka zariya hai. Islamic finance ka bada hissa.

questions.q: Islam mein Qarz-e-Hasana kya hai?
questions.a: Qarz-e-Hasana interest-free loan hai — Allah ne farmaya yeh Allah ko dena hai woh double deta hai. Yeh sawab ka kaam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Sood aur Islamic Finance ka farq kya hai?
questions.a: Sood guaranteed return hai — haram. Islamic finance mein risk share hota hai — profit sharing halal. Yeh bunyadi farq hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Zakat ka complete nizam kya hai?
questions.a: Zakat 2.5% maal par, 5-10% zeraai par, farz hai. 8 mustahiqeen hain — Quran mein. Properly nafi ho to ghurbat khatam.

questions.q: Islam mein Pakistan ka dastoor aur Islam mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Pakistan ka 1973 ka dastoor Islam ko state religion manta hai. Objective Resolution — Allah ki hukumat ka iqrar. Yeh Islamic state ka frame hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ijtemaa (Jummah, Eid) ki kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Ijtemaa se Muslim community ek hoti hai — masail discuss hote hain. Yeh social bonding aur dawat dono ka zariya hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Hajj ki ibadat mein kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Hajj global Muslim unity ka mazhar hai — sab ek rang mein. Ghuruband ka khatma, haqooq ki adaigi, naya azm karna — yeh Hajj ki hikmat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Roza ki ibadat mein kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Roza nafs ki tarbiyat, ghareeb ki taraf hamdardi, Allah ki khushi. "Roza shield hai" — burai se bachata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Namaz ki ibadat mein kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Namaz time management sikhati hai — discipline aur Allah se seedha talluq. "Namaz burai aur fahsha se rokti hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Zakat ki ibadat mein kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Zakat economic justice ka zariya hai — ameer ki selfishness khatam, gareeb ko madad. Maal ki purification.

questions.q: Islam mein Kalima ki kya hikmat hai?
questions.a: Kalima tawheed ka iqrar hai — sirf Allah ki ibadat. Yeh iman ka bunyadi usool aur Islamic state ka constitution hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Taubah aur Istikhfar mein kya farq hai?
questions.a: Taubah agle ke liye azm ke saath maafi maangna hai. Istikhfar sirf alfaz se. Taubah-e-Nasooha mein dono shaamil hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Hifz-e-Quran ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Hafiz-e-Quran ka Allah ke nazdeek buland maqam hai. "Hafiz apne walidain ko qiyamat mein taj pahnayega." Yeh badi khidmat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ijaz-ul-Quran kya hai?
questions.a: Ijaz — Quran ka mojiza — literary, scientific, historical sab mein. 1400 saal mein koi match nahi kar saka. Yeh Quran ki haqiqat ki daleel hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Nazm-e-Quran kya hai?
questions.a: Nazm-e-Quran Quran ka coherent system aur aayaat ka talluq hai. Har Surah mein ek mukammal theme hai — yeh Allah ki qudrat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Tadabbur-ul-Quran kya hai?
questions.a: Tadabbur Quran par gehri soch aur contemplation hai. Allah ne farmaya "Kya yeh Quran par tadabbur nahi karte?"

questions.q: Islam mein Tajdeed-e-Iman kya hai?
questions.a: Tajdeed-e-Iman iman ko taza karna hai — Kalima padhna, iman ke arkan yaad karna. Iman ghata badhta hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Mujaddid kaun hota hai?
questions.a: Mujaddid woh hota hai jo har sau saal baad Islam ko taaza karta hai. Imam Ghazali, Imam Ahmad bin Hanbal — mashhoor mujaddidin.

questions.q: Islam mein Ahl-e-Sunnah wal Jamaat kya hai?
questions.a: Ahl-e-Sunnah wal Jamaat woh hain jo Nabi (SAW) aur Sahaaba ki sunnat par hain. Pakistan mein yeh majority hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Wahdat-ul-Ummah kya hai?
questions.a: Wahdat-ul-Ummah Muslim ummah ki ittehad hai — "Sab Muslims ek jism hain." Ittehad mein taqat, ikhtilaf mein kamzori.

questions.q: Islam mein Ittihaad-e-Muslimeen ki zaroorat kyun hai?
questions.a: Muslim ummah aaj bikhri hui hai — dushman iska faida uthate hain. Quran aur Sunnah par ittehad — yahi hal hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Ghazwah-e-Hind ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Ghazwah-e-Hind Hadith mein mojood hai — qiyamat se pehle aayega. Yeh khaber Islam ki truthfulness ki daleel hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Dajjal ki kya nishaniyan hain?
questions.a: Dajjal ek aal zamana fitna hai — qiyamat ki badi nishani. Surah Al-Kahf padhna Dajjal se bachata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Hazrat Mahdi ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Hazrat Mahdi aakhir zamaan mein aayenge — Hadith mein mojood. Woh adal se zameen bhar denge jab zulm se bhari hogi.

questions.q: Islam mein Hazrat Isa (AS) ka dobara aana kyon hoga?
questions.a: Hazrat Isa (AS) aakhir zamaan mein aayenge — Dajjal ko maarenge, Islam laaenge. Yeh qiyamat ki badi nishani hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Yajuj Majuj ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Yajuj Majuj qiyamat ki badi nishani hai — woh fasaad karte hain. Hazrat Isa (AS) ki dua se halak honge.

questions.q: Islam mein Barzakh kya hai?
questions.a: Barzakh marne ke baad aur qiyamat se pehle ki zindagi hai. Mominon ke liye sukoon, kafiron ke liye azab.

questions.q: Islam mein Sirat-ul-Mustaqeem kya hai?
questions.a: Sirat-ul-Mustaqeem seedha raasta hai — jis par Anbiya, Siddiqeen, Shuhada aur Saliheen hain. Surah Fatiha mein is ki dua hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Taqdir aur Ikhtiyar mein kya talluq hai?
questions.a: Taqdeer Allah ka ilm hai lekin insaan ko ikhtiyar diya — woh choose karta hai. Ikhtiyar aur taqdeer dono saath chalte hain.

questions.q: Islam mein Aqeedah-e-Aakhirat ki kya zaroorat hai?
questions.a: Aakhirat par iman ke baghair insaan duniya mein zulm karta hai. Hisaab ka khauf insaan ko nek banata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Baqarah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Baqarah Quran ki sabse badi Surah hai — Verse of the Throne, no compulsion in religion. "Ghar mein parho — Shaitaan nahin aata."

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Imran ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Imran mein Ghazwa-e-Uhud ka zikar, Hazrat Isa (AS) ki paidaish, ittehad ka hukm. "Sab Allah ki rassi maazo."

questions.q: Islam mein Surah An-Nisa ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah An-Nisa mein auraton ke haqooq, meerath ka nizam, nikah ke ahkaam — Islam ka social law.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Maidah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Maidah mein wuzu, halal haram, adal ka hukm. "Jo Allah ke nazil karda ke mutabiq faisla na kare woh zaalim hai."

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Hujurat ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Hujurat social ethics ka Quran — gheebat, backbiting, mosauat haram. "Sab Adam ki aulad ho — taqwa par barteri."

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Ahzab ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Ahzab mein Nabi (SAW) ka uswah, Nabi (SAW) par darood, parda ka hukm. "Nabi (SAW) mominon ke liye unki jaanon se zyada qareeb hain."

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Kahf ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: Surah Al-Kahf Dajjal se hifazat, 4 qisse — deen, maal, ilm, taqat ki azmaish. Jummah ko padhna sunnat hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Yasin ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Yasin Quran ka dil hai." Marne walon ke paas padhna sunnat, aakhirat ki tayyaari ki yaad dilaata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Waqi'ah ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Jo roz Surah Waqi'ah parhe woh kabhi ghareeb nahi hoga." Yeh rizq ki barkat aur aakhirat ki tasweer hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Rahman ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Surah Al-Rahman Quran ki dulhan hai." 31 baar "Fabi ayyi ala Rabbikuma tukadhibaan" — Allah ki neamtein yaad dilata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Surah Al-Mulk ki kya ahmiyat hai?
questions.a: "Surah Al-Mulk apne padhne wale ki qabr mein shafaat karti hai." Roz raat padhna sunnat hai — azab-e-qabr se bachata hai.

questions.q: Islam mein Pakistan ko Islamic state banane ki kya zaroorat hai?
questions.a: Pakistan ki buniyaad Islamic ideology hai. Adal, khidmat, shura — jab yeh ho to Pakistan taraqqi karega. Har fard ki zimmedari hai.

questions.q: Islam mein aaj ka Muslim naujawan kya kare?
questions.a: Quran parho, samjho, amal karo. Halal kamao, haqooq-ul-ibad ada karo. Pakistan ke liye mehnat karo — yahi Islam hai.

questions.q: Islam mein khidmat-e-Islam ki kya zaroorat hai?
questions.a: "Behtar woh hai jo logon ke kaam aaye." Har Muslim apni jagah — teacher, doctor, engineer — Islam ki khidmat kar sakta hai.
